name: mega
desc: Mega is an open-source implementation of Google Piper — a Git-compatible monorepo engine built for the AI Agent era.

name: mcp-gateway-registry
desc: Enterprise-ready MCP Gateway & Registry that centralizes AI development tools with secure OAuth authentication, dynamic tool discovery, and unified access for both autonomous AI agents and AI coding assistants. Transform scattered MCP server chaos into governed, auditable tool access with Keycloak/Entra integration.

name: taskplane
desc: Multi-agent AI coding orchestration system designed to drive successful coding outcomes with a high level of transparency (think more light-factory than dark-factory).

name: agentic_coding_flywheel_setup
desc: Bootstraps a fresh Ubuntu VPS into a complete multi-agent AI development environment in 30 minutes: coding agents, session management, safety tools, and coordination infrastructure

name: codedb
desc: Zig code intelligence server and MCP toolset for AI agents. Fast tree, outline, symbol, search, read, edit, deps, snapshot, and remote GitHub repo queries.

name: worktrunk
desc: Worktrunk is a CLI for Git worktree management, designed for parallel AI agent workflows

name: oh-my-claudecode
desc: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

name: Peekaboo
desc: Peekaboo is a macOS CLI & optional MCP server that enables AI agents to capture screenshots of applications, or the entire system, with optional visual question answering through local or remote AI models.

name: lobehub
desc: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.
